system.description: For the smartest person in the room, the smartest god in the pantheon. Trouble.
system.title: God of Cunning

scriptures.name: Level 1: The Last Place You Look
scriptures.description: Roll a Wis pool and gain +1 temporary Guard for each success, up to your levels in this god. If you recast the spell, lose all temporary Guard.

scriptures.name: Level 2: Distraction
scriptures.description: A catastrophic illusion startles everyone in a close area. Everyone except you suffers a Disadvantage.

scriptures.name: Level 3: Backstab
scriptures.description: Must be cast whilst holding a symbolic, prepared dagger. If a target is unaware of your presence or has an unguarded back, your next attack gains:

specials.name: All hits in attack bypass Guard
Enemies now unaware of your presence
Learn one secret of the target
Someone close betrays target within a week
